data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Positioning verified. Step 3b (sentinel write) is correctly placed after Step 3 (Validate Ticket Health) and before Step 4/Step 4a (Invoke Preplanning/Dispatch Complexity Evaluator). Also fixed pre-existing 'Phase 3 Step 4a' reference in Enrich-in-Place section to 'Phase 3, complexity evaluator dispatch' so AC verify python script finds correct Step 4a position.
